name: VISA INC.
summary: Visa Inc. is a global digital payments company that provides transaction processing services—primarily authorization, clearing and settlement—through its proprietary VisaNet network across more than 200 countries and territories. Visa offers credit, debit, prepaid and cash access products through nearly 14,500 financial institution clients, serving nearly 5 billion payment credentials at over 175 million merchant locations. It also provides value-added services including Issuing Solutions, Acceptance Solutions, Risk and Security Solutions, and Advisory Services.

products.name: VisaNet
products.description: Proprietary advanced transaction processing network enabling authorization, clearing and settlement globally.

products.name: Visa as a Service
products.description: Four-layer stack (foundation, services, solutions, access) providing modular, API-based access to Visa network capabilities.

products.name: Visa Intelligent Commerce APIs
products.description: APIs enabling AI systems to interface with Visa's network via a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server.

products.name: Issuing Solutions
products.description: Value-added services supporting card issuers including certain data processing and other issuing capabilities.

products.name: Acceptance Solutions
products.description: Value-added services supporting merchant acceptance of Visa payment products.

products.name: Risk and Security Solutions
products.description: Services including authentication, risk management and fraud detection for clients.

products.name: Advisory and Other Services
products.description: Consulting and advisory services provided to Visa's clients as part of value-added services.

products.name: Visa Credit, Debit and Prepaid Cards
products.description: Branded payment credentials issued by financial institution clients for consumer, business and government use.

partnerships.description: Sponsorship partnership used for brand promotion and showcasing payment innovations.
